description_long: This is a futuristic, angular airplane with a tall, vertical dorsal fin and two sharply swept wings extending downward from the fuselage. The body is predominantly a matte gray, with subtle panel lines and surface details suggesting metallic construction. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage, featuring a dark, enclosed canopy. Twin cylindrical elements, likely representing engines or weaponry, are mounted beneath the cockpit area. The rear of the airplane is characterized by a large, rectangular exhaust or intake port and a blue accent line. The overall design is reminiscent of science fiction or advanced military aircraft, with a focus on aerodynamic efficiency and aggressive styling.
description: A sleek, gray, futuristic airplane with a tall dorsal fin, swept-down wings, and a forward cockpit with a dark canopy.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tall dorsal fin, forward cockpit, and twin cylindrical elements beneath the fuselage.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wide wingspan, large vertical fin, and rectangular rear exhaust with a blue accent.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the cockpit, dorsal fin, and surface panel details.
description_view_3: Angled rear view emphasizing the downward-swept wings, rear exhaust, and overall angular design.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept, downward-angled wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin cylindrical jet engines mounted beneath the forward fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Single tall vertical stabilizer with no horizontal stabilizers visible, resembling a dorsal fin.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible in the images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single dark canopy at the front of the fuselage.
